channel.title: auth on Morgoth
channel.description: Recent content in auth on Morgoth

item.title: Auth
item.description: auth.py 自定义authentication backend. from django.contrib.auth.backends import BaseBackend class MyBackend(BaseBackend): def authenticate(self, request): ... def get_user(self, user_id): ... 配置使用自定义backend AUTHENTICATION_BACKENDS = ("apps.ldap_auth.auth.MyBackend",) https://github.com/etianen/django-python3-ldap auth 配置 INSTALLED_APPS = ( 'django.contr
